title: Berserk
wikitext:
[]: Berserk             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Wed Apr 04, 2007 8:23 am slothen wrote: yui-sama going berserk seems to be a most effective tactic for killing things. However it seems that our friendly neighborhood "Smith" intends to defeat the angels without counting on it.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Wed Apr 04, 2007 9:09 am One argument that I had heard involves the later EVA models becoming increasingly more controllable. 00 was the first, and was also unusable for a while because of its constant berserkness. 01 has gone berserk 3 times in the series (Sachiel, Leliel, Zeruel) and EoE. 02 has gone berserk only once: before its death. Arguably, because 02 is a later model Asuka MAY have been able to control its berserker mode.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Apr 10, 2007 11:36 pm Szmitten wrote: One argument that I had heard involves the later EVA models becoming increasingly more controllable. 00 was the first, and was also unusable for a while because of its constant berserkness. 01 has gone berserk 3 times in the series (Sachiel, Leliel, Zeruel) and EoE. 02 has gone berserk only once: before its death. Arguably, because 02 is a later model Asuka MAY have been able to control its berserker mode.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Apr 10, 2007 11:39 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: Szmitten wrote: One argument that I had heard involves the later EVA models becoming increasingly more controllable. 00 was the first, and was also unusable for a while because of its constant berserkness. 01 has gone berserk 3 times in the series (Sachiel, Leliel, Zeruel) and EoE. 02 has gone berserk only once: before its death. Arguably, because 02 is a later model Asuka MAY have been able to control its berserker mode.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sat Apr 14, 2007 8:31 am But during the process of the Third Impact Eva-01 also went berserk ( you see her mouth opened and the shoulder plates went off) and Shinji was still in control, at least to a certain extent. Probably how berserk the Eva can become depends on how concious, and how protective the mother soul was?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Apr 14, 2007 12:00 pm tinmeigut wrote: Shinji was still in control, at least to a certain extent.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Apr 14, 2007 12:04 pm Shin-seiki wrote: How do you figure that Shinji was in control to any extent? Seems to me he was just screaming and/or whimpering the whole time.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 14, 2007 12:55 pm "This must be a definition of synchronization I wasn't previously aware of."

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Sat Apr 14, 2007 2:41 pm Interesting... thanks for the replies all!
